# Rectangle with a rectangular building hole at the centre — baseline
# hole case at 60° stall angle.

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
200,150
0,150
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon hole
80,50
120,50
120,100
80,100
----
hole: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=60
----
set stall_angle_deg=60

generate
----
total_stalls: 83

snapshot
----
